visible: Both nCount_Spatial and nFeature_Spatial spot layers follow the same tissue image geometry without a visible systematic offset.
The title, panel labels, color bars, ticks, tissue image, and spot overlays are visible in both the original and final-size exports.
The final-size export is more compact while retaining the spatial gradients visible in the original export.
interpretable: Within-section technical variation in detected counts and features can be inspected at Visium spot resolution.
confirmed: No clipping, blocking overlap, or coordinate-image misalignment was visible in the opened original/final pair.

visible: Eleven spot clusters labeled 0 through 10 are shown with distinct colors over the tissue image.
Cluster labels, leader lines, legend entries, tissue background, and spot positions remain readable in both exports.
The final-size export enlarges the text and legend relative to the plotting area without clipping labels or tissue.
interpretable: The figure supports descriptive comparison of expression-derived spot-cluster locations within this one section.
confirmed: The title explicitly identifies expression-derived spot clusters rather than cell types or spatially regularized domains.
No blocking label overlap or visible coordinate offset was present in the opened original/final pair.

visible: Hpca shows a broader central-to-lower spatial signal, whereas the strongest Ttr signal is localized toward the right upper portion of the section.
Both feature overlays follow the tissue and spot geometry consistently in the original and final-size exports.
Feature names, color bars, tick labels, tissue background, and spot signals are visible without clipping.
interpretable: The pair supports a descriptive visual comparison of SCT-normalized Hpca and Ttr spot-level patterns in this section.
confirmed: The final-size export preserves the same visible spatial patterns while improving label and color-scale readability.
No blocking overlap or visible coordinate-image misalignment was present in the opened original/final pair.
cannot_assert: marker enrichment tested by an inferential model

overall_findings: All three v9 original/final pairs were opened at original detail and retained their coordinate alignment, labels, legends, and descriptive meaning.
No visual change to filtering, normalization, clustering, thresholds, or statistical meaning was required.
